error_signature: Access to the file is not allowed. Allowed paths: C:\Users\xxxxx/.n8n-files
title: File access denied on SMB shares in n8n
symptom: When attempting to read/write files from SMB shares, n8n returns an access error stating that access to the file is not allowed.
applies_when: Trying to access files outside allowed paths
not_this_if: Using Docker with mounted SMB shares
root_cause: n8n restricts file access to specific paths for security reasons. By default, it only allows access to the .n8n-files directory, which prevents access to SMB shares unless configured otherwise.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_FILESYSTEM_ALLOWED_PATHS to include the SMB share paths.
Ensure n8n is running as a domain account with access to those shares or map the shares to local drive letters.
agent_instruction: Configure N8N_FILESYSTEM_ALLOWED_PATHS to include your SMB share paths and ensure proper permissions.
